Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna Mannion for San Francisco Public Administrator, Petitioner.

The court noted that at the last calling of the case, certain individuals indicated objections and were given a deadline to file written objections. The court confirmed that no written objections were filed. The court inquired if anyone present objected to the petition. No objections were raised. The court took the petition under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Continued To Dec-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mark George and Charles Geroge appeared via zoom for Valerian Odinstoff (objector).

Parties appeared to oppose the pre-granted petition. The Court orders parties to file a written objection on before November 22, 2024, the administrator to file a written response on or before December 6, 2024. The matter is continued to December 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a written objection is not filed, the objection will be waived.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1550 Ulloa Street, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Brianna Mannion, Esq., via Zoom, for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $1,450,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Additional bond is not required.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
